title: 2 Beds 1 Bath Apartment
description:
My friend and I are selling our leases together! King Henry has been the best, but we're moving for work/a mission. You could both move in as soon as the Spring!
pickleball, pool and hot tub, volleyball, gym, we even have a pizza oven. It will be a blast for the summer. Excited for you! Reach out with any questions:)

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
Located in the beautiful Heber Valley, Wasatch Commons Apartments provides you with endless opportunities to enjoy a life full of adventure and relaxation. At our apartments in Heber City, UT, you'll find winter is one of the best times of the year, with many world-class ski resorts located just a short drive away. During the summer, explore state parks, mountain trails, and all the natural world has to offer right outside your door.



|| If this feels right, provide your number 📞 and I’ll guide you through the process.


#ApartmentForRent #Available #RentFlat

title: 3 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment
description:
Female Shared Room Contract:
- Base Rent: $465.00
- Utilities: $55.00 (Fixed rate!!)
- Communications/ Internet Fee: $20.00
- Renter’s Liability Insurance: $13.00
- Total $$/Month: $553.00
-(Can be renewed!)

Amenities:
-Pool
-Big Hottub!
-BBQ
-Grills
-On site laundry
-Sand Volleyball
-Clubhouse:
          -Pool Table
          -Ping Pong
          -TV & Couches
          -Kitchen
          -Vending/ Concessions

Reasons you should move here: 
- BEST roommates ever! (I know everyone says this, but they’re actually the best:))
- Roommates are all 19-21
- Everyone in the apartment goes to BYU! (Go Cougars!!)
-Shuttle that takes you to and from byu!! (No need to walk!)
-Right across from Wyview!
-Legit best ward ever—like I want to stay for the summer because of it—but I have to go back home

Contract available for the spring and summer! (As soon as the semester ends.) Contract ends in August! (I’m only leaving because I’m going back home for the summer:))

title: Private room for rent
description:
Private room for rent

Private room 15 minute walk from BYU campus available in April 2026!!!

$595/month
+utilities & internet (usually around $40 each month)

Super nice roommates, ward, and landlady (no cleaning checks 😁😁)!!

4 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms so you just have to share a bathroom with one other person!

Large kitchen and living space, dishwasher, washer & dryer, good storage space, and guaranteed parking in a parking garage for no extra cost!!

Message me if interested!

title: 1 Bed 1 Bath Apartment
description:
⭐ Private Studio in Lehi ⭐ 

$950/month

✔ All utilities INCLUDED
✔No Roommates!!
✔ Private bathroom (no sharing)
✔ Private walk-out entrance
✔ Kitchenette (mini fridge w/freezer, microwave, sink)
✔ Brand new flooring + cabinetry
✔ High-speed internet INCLUDED

Fully private 300 sq ft basement studio with private entrance. 

Ideal for a single professional seeking quiet and independent living.

Located in a safe, quiet Lehi neighborhood:

• 3 min to I-15
• Close to Silicon Slopes, restaurants, gyms, grocery stores

No smoking
No pets
No vaping

Bed available if needed.

title: 4 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment
description:
4 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment

3 Private Rooms Available! 

I’m selling my lease at Lanai starting June 1st! I’ve lived here for the last two years and it has been amazing!
- Close to campus (10 minute walk)
- Private room!
- Affordable
- Plenty of parking
- Our ward is combined with the south building of college place and is the best ward I’ve been in!! 
- Our apartment specifically has one of the biggest living rooms and couches!

2 of my other roommates are selling too so you can move in with friends! Also renewable for Fall 2026! Let me know if you’re interested!

title: 3 Beds 2 Baths - Apartment
description:
🌸Shared room Spring/Summer  renewable for Fall– Brownstone Condominiums  

I’m selling my contract at Brownstone Condominiums, available starting April 23 for Spring/Summer, with the option to renew in the fall! More than one spot  is available!

I’ve loved living here — I’m only moving out because I’m moving in with a friend!

- Shuttle stops right in front of the building and takes you straight to BYU campus  
- Free parking included with your contract  
- Brand new furniture throughout the apartment  
- Lots of refrigerator space + a pantry (huge bonus!)  
- Laundry downstairs — only $0.50 to wash and $0.25 to dry  
- Utilities are split between 6 roommates, typically coming out to about $15/month per person  
- No extra hidden fees  
- Super responsive maintenance team  
- An amazing ward and community  
- Multiple openings available if you and your friends want to live together!

🛏 Bonus: My bed is currently set up as a loft for extra space — totally optional and can be removed if preferred.

Message me if you’re interested or want more details!

title: 2 Beds 1 Bath - Apartment
description:
Liberty on Freedom 
Shared room, both beds available!

January and February FREE!!
Looking for someone to take over my lease starting January! I’m heading out on a church mission, and I’m so sad to leave—awesome roommates, great apartment, and super affordable overall. Message me if you’re interested! 

- $540 (utilities included) 
- Pool & hot tub
- Shared room
- 10 min walk from BYU
- TV
- Lease is January-August
- Fully furnished

title: 2 beds 2 baths Flat
description:
🌷I’m moving out for the summer and I’m subleasing my contract for Spring/Summer Term! 

☀️LOTS of natural lighting (it's a corner apt with lots of windows!)

 📍Santa Barbra Villa Condos! Joaquin/South Campus Provo (right next to the village!)

📚8 minute walk to BYU campus or a 5 minute walk to the bus station for UVU! 

🎉 Very social complex and neighborhood! 

🗓️ May 1st-August 31st 

💵 $420/month with a large shared bathroom around ~$30-$35 a month in utilities 

🫧 In-Unit Washer and Dryer

💒The BEST YSA ward! So social and so fun! 

📱 Reach out with any questions/ if you would like to schedule a tour!

🍁 Please note there is NOT an option to resign for fall since I’m moving back in (i love it here!!) 

💕ROOM W/ FRIENDS: This is a 2 bedroom, 2 full bathroom condo south of BYU campus (3 people total!) There are two bedrooms, 1 private and 1 large shared. My roommates are going home for the summer, reach out if you’re interested and rooming with your friends and I can send you their listing!  :))
